claim_bullets.bullet_text: For nearly twenty years, variables were declared with var (not counting parameters and function declarations, of course). (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.154-154)
The other kids were adding the numbers like this: 1 + 2 + 3 + . (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.154-154)
